suggestions.title: Missing aria-labels on office view characters
suggestions.description: The Office tab SVG characters have role='img' and aria-label, which is great, but the entire Office view tab panel lacks descriptive text for screen readers. Someone using assistive tech would have no idea what the office visualization represents. Add an aria-label or sr-only description to the office tabpanel.

suggestions.title: No error state or retry mechanism for failed data fetches
suggestions.description: When fetchWorkersFromGitHub fails, isLive goes to false but there's no user-facing error message or manual retry button on the dashboard tab. The activity log has an error state but workers just silently show stale data. Add a visible error banner with a retry button.

suggestions.title: Office view characters overlap on tablets (768-900px)
suggestions.description: The desk positions use percentage-based left/top values that work at desktop and small mobile, but at tablet widths the characters' absolute positioning causes overlap with desk furniture. The 768px breakpoint reduces avatar size but doesn't adjust desk spacing. Consider tightening desk grid or adding a tablet-specific layout.

suggestions.title: Activity log has no filtering or search
suggestions.description: With 30+ activity entries already on day one, the log will grow fast. Add simple filter buttons (hire/complete/system/all) so users can find specific events. Even just a type filter would help.

suggestions.title: Ghost characters lack context without hovering
suggestions.description: Ghost roster members at desks just look like dimmed characters. On mobile (where hover doesn't exist), there's no way to tell they're 'off duty' vs 'working'. Add a small status indicator or 'zzz' icon above ghost characters.

suggestions.title: Polling both endpoints every 10 seconds is aggressive
suggestions.description: raw.githubusercontent.com has CDN caching (~5 min), so polling every 10s just hits cached data repeatedly. Consider increasing POLL_INTERVAL_ACTIVE to 30-60s since the data won't change faster than GitHub's CDN cache anyway. Saves bandwidth and reduces unnecessary renders.

suggestions.title: ROLE_EMOJIS duplicated between App.jsx and Office.jsx
suggestions.description: Role-to-emoji/color mappings exist in both files. Extract to a shared constants file (e.g., src/constants.js) to avoid drift. Already seeing 'QA Engineer' vs 'QA & Product Analyst' role name inconsistency potential.

suggestions.title: Add a 'last seen' timestamp for ghost/offline workers
suggestions.description: Would be nice to see when each roster member was last active. The data is in activity.json already — just needs a UI treatment. Show 'Last active: 2h ago' under ghost characters or in a roster panel.

suggestions.title: Footer feels disconnected from the fun vibe
suggestions.description: The footer quote 'If it compiles, ship it' is great, but visually it's plain. Could add a subtle gradient or the same purple accent treatment as the header to tie it together. Minor polish.

suggestions.title: Color contrast on muted text may fail WCAG AA
suggestions.description: Several --text-muted elements (timestamps, labels, role text) against dark backgrounds may not meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Worth running a contrast checker on the dark theme especially. Light theme seems better.

positive_notes: The SVG character avatars are genuinely charming — each team member has personality. Great touch.
Theme toggle works smoothly with proper transitions. localStorage persistence is correct.
Skip-link and ARIA roles on tabs show accessibility awareness — just needs more coverage.
The office view concept is creative and fun. Definitely the highlight of the project.
Smart use of raw.githubusercontent.com instead of API (fixed from review #1). No more rate limits.
